prompt: Create a custom dark neon theme for html-deck. Save it as `theme-neon-custom.css`. The background should be pitch black (#050505), body text bright green (#10b981), primary accent hot pink (#ff007f), and secondary accent neon blue (#00f2fe). Write the theme in a separate file. You must only override CSS variables under the `:root` selector. Do not use element or class selectors. Show how to import it in a sample JS entry point after `html-deck/css`.
assertions: The custom theme is written in a separate CSS file named theme-neon-custom.css
The CSS file contains only overrides under the :root selector
The theme specifies the exact core colors requested (background: #050505, text: #10b981, main: #ff007f, accent: #00f2fe)
The sample import structure is correctly demonstrated
Text meets WCAG AA contrast standard against background colors
